_comment: Example brief for avatar-invent. Either pass these as CLI flags or drop a brief.json in the avatar folder before the first run. The agent then refines scene.json / talking_profile.json / voice_brief.json at the author checkpoint.
name: nora
description: A warm, reassuring Chilean woman in her mid 30s, a clinical psychologist; soft features, shoulder-length dark wavy hair, light makeup, kind attentive eyes, a calm grounded presence
voice_description: A warm, calm Chilean Spanish woman's voice, mid 30s, soft and reassuring, unhurried and empathetic, like a trusted therapist speaking gently to one person
